pka_res_desc_t Struct Reference
[MiCA PKA Device API (gxio/pka.h)]

The result descriptor. More...

uint32_t tag
 Unchanged from the command descriptor and can be used to match the result to a given command.

 Reserved.
uint32_t modulo_is_0: 1
 Reserved.
uint32_t rsvd_4: 2
 Reserved.
uint32_t hw_len_a: 9
 Copied from command, unchanged.
uint32_t rsvd_5: 7
 Reserved.
uint32_t hw_len_b: 9
 Copied from command, unchanged.
uint32_t rsvd_6: 2
 Reserved.
uint32_t cmp_res: 3
 Used only for basic "compare" command.
uint32_t command: 8
 The command that was run, unchanged.
uint32_t result_code: 8
 The result of the operation.
uint32_t enc_vectors_bitmask: 6
 Which of the five input parameter vectors were provided in encrypted form, unchanged.
uint32_t kdr: 2
 Indicates which KDK had to be used to decrypt encrypted parameter vectors, unchanged from the command.
uint32_t odd_powers: 5
 The number of bits to shift for shift left/right basic operations or the number of odd powers to use for modular exponentiation operations, unchanged from the command.
uint32_t written_zero: 2
 Forced to 0 when the result is written by hardware.
uint32_t linked: 1
 Unchanged from command descriptor.

Detailed Description

The result descriptor.

After finishing a command, the PKA master controller will convert the original command descriptor (as described in the previous section) into a result descriptor and write this descriptor to the result ring.

uint32_t pka_res_desc_t::tag

Unchanged from the command descriptor and can be used to match the result to a given command.

Reserved.

Reserved.

uint32_t pka_res_desc_t::hw_len_a

Copied from command, unchanged.

uint32_t pka_res_desc_t::rsvd_5

Reserved.

uint32_t pka_res_desc_t::hw_len_b

Copied from command, unchanged.

uint32_t pka_res_desc_t::rsvd_6

Reserved.

uint32_t pka_res_desc_t::cmp_res

Used only for basic "compare" command.

uint32_t pka_res_desc_t::command

The command that was run, unchanged.

uint32_t pka_res_desc_t::result_code

The result of the operation.

0 indicates no error.

uint32_t pka_res_desc_t::enc_vectors_bitmask

Which of the five input parameter vectors were provided in encrypted form, unchanged.

uint32_t pka_res_desc_t::kdr

Indicates which KDK had to be used to decrypt encrypted parameter vectors, unchanged from the command.

uint32_t pka_res_desc_t::odd_powers

The number of bits to shift for shift left/right basic operations or the number of odd powers to use for modular exponentiation operations, unchanged from the command.

uint32_t pka_res_desc_t::written_zero

Forced to 0 when the result is written by hardware.

uint32_t pka_res_desc_t::linked

Unchanged from command descriptor.
